subcodes.first_line: This is a glorious Book sent down from the dominion of thy Lord's Will, the Most Exalted, the Most Great, wherein floweth the Water of Life that giveth life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب کریم نزل من جبروت مشیه ربک العلی العظیم و فیه کوثر الحیوان تحیی به
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @knowledge; recognition of God
